creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
delphij     2012-04-23 19:53:30 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/openldap24-server Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    net/openldap24-server/files patch-shlib-version

    net/openldap24-server/files pkg-install.in 
  Log:
   - Allow building with MDB option;
   - Fixup for plist;
   - Remove sites that no longer carries distfiles;
   - Use USERS/GROUPS to eliminate duplicated code in pkg-install
   - Update to 2.4.31[1]
  
  PR:             ports/167102
  Submitted by:   Hirohisa Yamaguchi <umq ueo co jp>, myself [1]
